name: @aqua/plugin-agency-payroll
description: Aqua portal internal-team payroll surface — pay periods, payslips, contractor list, monthly totals. Operator-paste amounts (no real bank/Stripe wiring; T6 prod gate). Soft-pairs @aqua/plugin-agency-hr (Staff source-of-truth) + @aqua/plugin-agency-finance (invoice reconciliation hint via payroll.payslip.paid event).
